svg.title: VibeFinder 2.0 system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: input layer with user query and songs CSV, AI core with RAG retriever, scoring engine, agentic critic and reliability guardrails, and output layer with ranked recommendations and structured logs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the natural language query input look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the user taste profile contain?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the songs CSV catalog?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG retriever work in VibeFinder 2.0?')
sendPrompt('What does the scoring engine do?')
sendPrompt('What guardrails does the system have?')
sendPrompt('How does the agentic self-critique loop work?')
sendPrompt('What gets written to the decision log?')
sendPrompt('What does the recommendations output look like?')
sendPrompt('Where are logs written and what do they contain?')
sendPrompt('Where does human evaluation happen in the pipeline?')
